metaTitle: Table Builder That Works Offline | Tablesmit
metaDescription: Tablesmit works without an internet connection. Build, edit, and export tables on a plane, in a tunnel, or anywhere your Wi-Fi fails. Free, no account needed.
heroHeadline: Build tables anywhere. No internet required.
heroSubtext: Tablesmit is a Progressive Web App. Once loaded, it works completely offline — build tables, apply themes, merge cells, and export to PDF or Excel without a connection.

benefits.heading: Works on planes, trains, and offline environments
benefits.body: Load Tablesmit once on any network. From that point, the app runs from your browser's local cache — no connection needed to build, edit, or export.

benefits.heading: Auto-updates in the background
benefits.body: When you are back online, the service worker checks for updates silently. The next time you open Tablesmit, you get the latest version — without manually refreshing or clearing cache.

benefits.heading: Install as an app
benefits.body: In Chrome or Edge, click 'Install' in the browser address bar to add Tablesmit to your desktop or home screen. It opens like a native app — full screen, no browser chrome.

benefits.heading: Nothing is stored in the cloud
benefits.body: Offline mode means local mode. Your table data exists in your browser session. Nothing is synced, stored, or accessible from another device. Your data is yours.

steps.heading: Visit Tablesmit while online
steps.body: Open tablesmit.com in Chrome, Edge, Firefox, or Safari. The service worker installs automatically on first visit — you don't need to do anything.

steps.heading: Go offline
steps.body: Disconnect from the internet. Tablesmit continues to work exactly as it did online — all features, all exports, all themes.

steps.heading: Install as an app (optional)
steps.body: Look for the install prompt in your browser's address bar. Click Install to add Tablesmit to your desktop or home screen for instant access without opening a browser tab.

useCases: Building a research table on a long-haul flight without in-flight Wi-Fi
Working in a conference or field environment where connectivity is unreliable
Using Tablesmit on an offline-only device in a secure or air-gapped environment
Installing Tablesmit as a desktop app for a distraction-free, browser-free experience
